title: bus.redis-mirror.config v1
description: Configuration schema for the redis-mirror adapter. Defines which channels to mirror to Redis Streams, stream retention parameters, and connection settings.

channels.description: List of channel type prefixes to mirror. Events whose 'type' starts with any of these prefixes will be XADD'd to Redis Streams.

maxlen.description: Maximum stream length (MAXLEN). Older entries are trimmed when limit is reached.

trim_strategy.description: Trim strategy: MAXLEN trims to N entries, MINID trims entries older than a timestamp

min_idle_ms.description: For MINID strategy: only trim entries older than this idle time in milliseconds

offset_file.description: Path to file where tail position is persisted for restart resilience

metrics_interval_s.description: Interval in seconds for logging metrics to stderr
